ORDER DISMISSING CONTESTANT'S STATEMENT OF ELECTION CONTEST

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON ORDER SETTING HEARING ON STATEMENT OF ELECTION CONTEST. PETITIONER MICHAEL DENNY CHALLENGES PROPOSITION A, THE AFFORDABLE HOUSING BOND MEASURE ENACTED BY SAN FRANCISCO'S VOTERS ON THE NOVEMBER 2019 BALLOT BY A 71.16% TO 28.84% VOTE. PETITIONER'S ELECTION CONTEST IS BROUGHT PURSUANT TO DIVISION 16 OF THE ELECTIONS CODE, ELEC. CODE 16000-16940. PETITIONER PREVIOUSLY BROUGHT SUBSTANTIALLY IDENTICAL CLAIMS IN A SEPARATE PRE-ELECTION CHALLENGE TO PROPOSITION A, WHICH THIS COURT DISMISSED ON DEMURRER. (DENNY V. HERRERA, NO. CPF-19-515823 (OCT. 11, 2019 ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE).) (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER AND JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Order Setting Hearing On Statement Of Election Contest
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Hearing On Order Setting Hearing On Statement Of Election Contest.

Petitioner Michael Denny challenges Proposition A, the Affordable Housing Bond measure enacted by San Francisco's voters on the November 2019 ballot by a 71.16% to 28.84% vote. Petitioner's election contest is brought pursuant to Division 16 of the Elections Code, Elec. Code 16000-16940. Petitioner previously brought substantially identical claims in a separate pre-election challenge to Proposition A, which this court dismissed on demurrer. (Denny v. Herrera, No. CPF-19-515823 (Oct. 11, 2019 order sustaining demurrer to petition for writ of mandate).) (see word minutes for full details)

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Hearing On Order Setting Hearing On Statement Of Election Contest
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Continued To Feb-05-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Hearing On Order Setting Hearing On Statement Of Election Contest is continued to February 5, 2020 per the agreement of the parties and ex parte order filed 1/7/20.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
